title: Ultimate Veggie Burger Patty

seo.title: Ultimate Veggie Burger Patty Recipe: Easy Homemade
seo.metaDescription: Master the ultimate homemade veggie burger patty recipe! Learn to make delicious, healthy, and easy vegetarian burger patties from scratch.
longTailKeywords: how to make veggie burger patties
ultimate veggie burger recipe from scratch
h2Headings: What Makes an Ultimate Veggie Burger Patty?
Ingredients for Your Perfect Veggie Burger
Step-by-Step Guide to Making Veggie Burger Patties
Pro Tips for the Best Veggie Burger Results
Variations and Substitutions for Your Patty
seo.imageAlt: A stack of ultimate veggie burger patties on a cutting board with fresh ingredients like lettuce and tomato.
seo.imageCaption: Craft your own ultimate veggie burger patties at home – perfect for a healthy and satisfying meal!

description: Craft the ultimate homemade veggie burger patties bursting with flavor and wholesome ingredients. These savory, satisfying burgers are perfect for a healthy weeknight meal or a delicious backyard barbecue. Enjoy a taste of American comfort food, made vegetarian-friendly and incredibly delicious.

instructions.title: Saute Aromatics
instructions.text: Heat 1 tablespoon olive oil in a large skillet over medium heat. Add the finely diced yellow onion and cook until softened, about 5 minutes. Add minced garlic and finely chopped cremini mushrooms, cooking until mushrooms have released their liquid and are browned, about 8-10 minutes. Remove from heat and let cool slightly.

instructions.title: Prepare Base Mixture
instructions.text: In a large mixing bowl, mash the rinsed and drained black beans with a fork or potato masher until mostly smooth but still with some texture. Stir in the cooked brown rice.

instructions.title: Combine All Ingredients
instructions.text: Add the cooled onion-mushroom mixture, panko breadcrumbs, lightly beaten egg, Worcestershire sauce (if using), smoked paprika, and cumin to the bean and rice mixture. Season generously with salt and black pepper.

instructions.title: Form Patties
instructions.text: Mix all ingredients thoroughly until well combined. The mixture should be cohesive and hold together when pressed. Divide the mixture into 4 equal portions and shape each into a firm, 1-inch thick patty. For best results, refrigerate patties for 30 minutes to firm up.

instructions.title: Pan-Sear Patties
instructions.text: Heat the remaining 1 tablespoon of olive oil in the same skillet (or a clean one) over medium-high heat. Carefully place the chilled veggie burger patties in the hot skillet. Cook for 5-7 minutes per side, until deeply golden brown and crispy.

instructions.title: Finish Cooking and Serve
instructions.text: Ensure the patties are heated through. If desired, you can also bake them at 375F (190C) for 10-15 minutes after pan-searing for a firmer texture. Serve hot on your favorite burger buns with desired toppings.

tips: For a truly robust flavor, dont skip browning the mushrooms and onions well; this caramelization adds depth to the patty.
If you prefer a vegan patty, substitute the egg with a flax egg (1 tbsp ground flaxseed mixed with 3 tbsp water, let sit for 5 minutes).
Cooked patties can be stored in an airtight container in the refrigerator for up to 3-4 days. Reheat gently in a skillet or oven.
article: Ultimate Veggie Burger Patty is a beloved American Vegetarian dish enjoyed across American. This authentic recipe brings traditional flavors to your kitchen.
